triggerEvents.label: Application stage changed
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a candidate moves to a configured stage in your ATS

triggerEvents.label: New application submitted
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a candidate applies — auto-invite them to a screening session

triggerEvents.label: Interview scheduled
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when an interview is created in the ATS

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch from ATS record
triggerEvents.desc: Recruiter clicks Start Session directly from the candidate profile

triggerEvents.label: External webhook
triggerEvents.desc: Send a POST to your Sonesse endpoint from any system or automation

postMeetingActions.label: Move to next stage
postMeetingActions.desc: Automatically advances the candidate to the next configured ATS stage

postMeetingActions.label: Add interview notes
postMeetingActions.desc: Posts the AI-generated session summary as a note on the application record

postMeetingActions.label: Attach full transcript
postMeetingActions.desc: Uploads the session transcript as a file attachment to the candidate record

postMeetingActions.label: Update candidate score
postMeetingActions.desc: Writes the AI-generated interview score back to the candidate profile

postMeetingActions.label: Reject candidate
postMeetingActions.desc: Sets the application status to rejected with a configurable reason

postMeetingActions.label: Schedule next interview
postMeetingActions.desc: Creates a follow-up interview in the ATS and sends an invite to the candidate

outputs.video: Stored in Sonesse, linked from candidate profile
outputs.summary: Posted as note on ATS application

triggerEvents.label: New deal created
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a deal or opportunity is created in your CRM

triggerEvents.label: Deal stage changed
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a deal moves to a configured stage — trigger a qualification call

triggerEvents.label: Demo or meeting booked
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a meeting is scheduled via your CRM or calendar integration

triggerEvents.label: New contact added
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a new contact is created — auto-start an intro session

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch from CRM record
triggerEvents.desc: Sales rep clicks Start Session directly from the contact or deal record

triggerEvents.label: External webhook
triggerEvents.desc: Send a POST to your Sonesse endpoint from any system or automation

postMeetingActions.label: Update deal stage
postMeetingActions.desc: Advances the deal to the next configured stage in your CRM

postMeetingActions.label: Log session notes
postMeetingActions.desc: Posts the AI-generated summary as a note on the contact or deal record

postMeetingActions.label: Create follow-up task
postMeetingActions.desc: Adds a follow-up task assigned to the rep with a due date

postMeetingActions.label: Update lead score
postMeetingActions.desc: Writes the AI engagement score back to the contact record

postMeetingActions.label: Schedule next meeting
postMeetingActions.desc: Creates a follow-up meeting in your CRM and sends an invite

postMeetingActions.label: Attach transcript
postMeetingActions.desc: Uploads the session transcript as a file on the deal or contact record

outputs.transcript: Attached to CRM deal or contact record
outputs.video: Stored in Sonesse, linked from deal record
outputs.summary: Posted as note on CRM contact

triggerEvents.label: Course enrollment created
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a learner is enrolled in a course — send an intro session

triggerEvents.label: Module completed
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a learner completes a module — offer a practice session

triggerEvents.label: Assessment submitted
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a learner submits an assessment — debrief with AI tutor

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch from learner profile
triggerEvents.desc: Instructor starts a session from the learner record in the LMS

postMeetingActions.label: Mark module complete
postMeetingActions.desc: Updates module completion status in the LMS for the learner

postMeetingActions.label: Add coaching note
postMeetingActions.desc: Adds the AI session summary as a note on the learner's profile

postMeetingActions.label: Update assessment score
postMeetingActions.desc: Writes the AI-evaluated score back to the LMS gradebook

postMeetingActions.label: Enroll in next module
postMeetingActions.desc: Automatically enrolls the learner in the next course or module

postMeetingActions.label: Notify instructor
postMeetingActions.desc: Sends a progress summary to the assigned instructor

outputs.transcript: Attached to learner profile in LMS
outputs.video: Stored in Sonesse, linked from learner record
outputs.summary: Posted as coaching note in LMS

triggerEvents.label: New deal created
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a deal or opportunity is created in your CRM

triggerEvents.label: Deal stage changed
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a deal moves to a configured stage — trigger a coaching session

triggerEvents.label: New contact added
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a new contact is created — auto-start an intro coaching session

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch
triggerEvents.desc: Manager or rep clicks Start Session from the record

triggerEvents.label: External webhook
triggerEvents.desc: Send a POST to your Sonesse endpoint from any system

postMeetingActions.label: Log session notes
postMeetingActions.desc: Posts the AI-generated coaching summary as a note on the record

postMeetingActions.label: Create follow-up task
postMeetingActions.desc: Adds a follow-up task with a due date assigned to the coachee

postMeetingActions.label: Update performance score
postMeetingActions.desc: Writes the AI coaching score back to the contact or profile

postMeetingActions.label: Schedule next session
postMeetingActions.desc: Books the next coaching session and sends an invite

postMeetingActions.label: Attach transcript
postMeetingActions.desc: Uploads the session transcript to the record

outputs.transcript: Attached to CRM or HRIS contact record
outputs.video: Stored in Sonesse, linked from profile
outputs.summary: Posted as coaching note on record

useCases.label: Onboarding
useCases.desc: Guide new hires or users through setup

triggerEvents.label: New hire added
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a new employee is added to your HRIS — kick off onboarding

triggerEvents.label: Onboarding task activated
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when an onboarding workflow starts in your HRIS

triggerEvents.label: Start date approaching
triggerEvents.desc: Fires 3 days before an employee's start date — send a welcome prep session

triggerEvents.label: Onboarding task completed
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when an employee completes a task in the HRIS onboarding flow

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch from employee record
triggerEvents.desc: HR clicks Start Session directly from the employee profile

postMeetingActions.label: Mark onboarding task complete
postMeetingActions.desc: Updates the task status in your HRIS onboarding workflow

postMeetingActions.label: Add note to employee record
postMeetingActions.desc: Posts the session summary as a note on the employee profile

postMeetingActions.label: Advance onboarding stage
postMeetingActions.desc: Moves the employee to the next stage in their onboarding plan

postMeetingActions.label: Notify HR partner
postMeetingActions.desc: Sends a summary to the assigned HR partner via email or Slack

postMeetingActions.label: Attach session recording
postMeetingActions.desc: Uploads the recording to the employee's document folder in HRIS

postMeetingActions.label: Schedule follow-up session
postMeetingActions.desc: Books a follow-up onboarding session for the employee

outputs.transcript: Attached to employee record in HRIS
outputs.summary: Posted as note on HRIS employee profile

useCases.label: Meeting Bot
useCases.desc: Join meetings to take notes and assist

triggerEvents.label: Meeting booked
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a meeting is scheduled — bot joins automatically

triggerEvents.label: New deal created
triggerEvents.desc: Fires when a deal is created — bot joins the discovery call

triggerEvents.label: Calendar event starts
triggerEvents.desc: Bot joins when a scheduled calendar event begins

triggerEvents.label: Manual launch
triggerEvents.desc: User clicks to invite the bot into a live meeting

postMeetingActions.label: Log meeting notes
postMeetingActions.desc: Posts the AI-generated meeting summary as a note on the CRM record

postMeetingActions.label: Create action items as tasks
postMeetingActions.desc: Converts AI-detected action items into tasks assigned to the right owner

postMeetingActions.label: Update deal stage
postMeetingActions.desc: Advances the deal based on meeting outcome signals

postMeetingActions.label: Schedule follow-up meeting
postMeetingActions.desc: Books the next meeting and sends invites

postMeetingActions.label: Attach transcript
postMeetingActions.desc: Uploads the full meeting transcript to the CRM record

outputs.transcript: Attached to CRM deal or contact record
outputs.video: Stored in Sonesse, shared link in CRM note
outputs.summary: Posted as meeting summary note in CRM

triggerEvents.label: New deal created
